text: Web Access Control Lists (WEBACL) sttt ©) s * WEBACL Default Action (ALLOW or BLOCK) - Non matching * Resource Type - CloudFront or Regional Service e .. ALB, APl GW, AppSync .. pick region * Add Rule Groups or Rules .. processed in order * Web ACL Capacity Units (WCU) - Default 1500 e .. can be increased via support ticket o WEBACL's are associated with resources (this can take time) e ... adjusting a WEBACL takes less time than associating one
